body: This PR adds a new pipeline file: `.buildkite/longruns/pipeline.yml`, which runs long-run Held-Suarez simulations. I've added the ClimaAtmos-LongRuns pipeline which monitors this new pipeline yaml, where I've set up a scheduled builds (`@midnight` to start with), we can change to `@weekly` if it seems unnecessary.
title: Add long run job to buildkite

body:
For now, it is simplest to create a new folder for moist simulation and copy paste. It makes it harder to view the modifications for moist. Please `vimdiff` to see the differences.

Co-authored-by: Toby Bischoff <bischtob@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Anna Jaruga <trontrytel@users.noreply.github.com>
title: Add moist baroclinic wave
